body.title: UPDATE T-uc-named-channels: add unified markup layer
body.result: Superseded by T-uc-comms-module. Comms channels with full routing, envelopes, transports, and notifications.
body.description: MERGE INTO T-uc-named-channels: Messages carry semantic markup tags. Each channel consumer (terminal→ANSI, web→HTML, logfile→strip, pipe→strip) translates at the endpoint. One rendering decision point replaces per-Console force_terminal hacks. Rich tags or HTML-like tags as the canonical format.
